ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the athlete's representing country */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's primary sport */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete's coach */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the athlete */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline within the sport */,
  "sport_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sport */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Name of the governing body for the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport associated with the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "event_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the event (e.g., Men, Women, Mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete who participated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "medal" TEXT /* Medal won by the athlete (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "medal_value" INTEGER /* Value assigned to the medal */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "performance_details" TEXT /* Additional performance details (e.g., time, distance) */,
  "event_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the event (e.g., Qualifying, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "national_anthem" TEXT /* Name of the national anthem */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES athletes ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of medal */,
  "medal_type" TEXT /* Type of medal (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "medal_value" INTEGER /* Value assigned to the medal */,
  "medal_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the medal */,
  "medal_design" TEXT /* Brief description of the medal design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_medal_type FOREIGN KEY ("medal_type") REFERENCES results ("medal")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the Olympic Games */,
  "host_city" TEXT /* Host city of the Olympic Games */,
  "opening_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening ceremony */,
  "closing_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the closing ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the sponsor's country */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount sponsored */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., Referee, Judge) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the official's country */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "events_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the event is taking place */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the event */,
  "event_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the event (e.g., Qualifying, Final) */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the managing official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_schedule_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_schedule_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "event_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result associated with an athlete */,
  "score" REAL /* Score or performance metric for the result */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "performance_details" TEXT /* Additional performance details (e.g., time, distance) */,
  "event_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the event (e.g., Qualifying, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the coach's country */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the coach specializes in */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of facilities available at the venue */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the venue's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)
